title: NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
shortInfo: National Institute of Technology Warangal (NIT Warangal) Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on the official website nitw.ac.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

basic_details.job_title: NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Warangal (NIT Warangal) Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on the official website nitw.ac.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules. Upper age limit relaxable by up to 5 years for SC/ST/OBC, women, and persons with disabilities.

qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow : B.Tech/B.E or Equivalent degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering (or Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering or equivalent) and M.Tech/M.E in Electronics and Communication Engineering or equivalent with Research areas in Embedded and Machine Learning Systems/Signal and Image Processing/VLSI-System Design/Artificial Intelligence/Computer Vision or equivalent (OR) B.Tech/B.E or Equivalent degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering/Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering or equivalent. Minimum 60% aggregate marks or 6.5 CGPA at both UG and PG for GEN/GEN-EWS/OBC-NCL and 55% or 6.0 CGPA for SC/ST/PwD (or 7.5/10 or 70% for Bachelor's under GEN etc. and 7.0/10 or 65% for SC/ST/PwD).

salary_details.details: Rs. 37,000+HRA (1st and 2nd Year), Rs. 42,000+HRA (3rd Year) if selected through CSIR UGC NET or GATE. Rs. 30,000+HRA (1st and 2nd Year), Rs. 33,000+HRA (3rd Year) otherwise.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIT Warangal to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Warangal JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the Junior Research Fellow positions at NIT Warangal is 30th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position announced by NIT Warangal.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a B.Tech/B.E and M.Tech/M.E degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering or equivalent, with specific aggregate marks or CGPA requirements.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow post is 30 years, with relaxations applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the JRF role?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 30,000 to Rs. 42,000 per month plus HRA, depending on qualifications and selection through NET/GATE.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the JRF position at NIT Warangal?
faq.answer: The selection process will primarily involve an Interview, which can be conducted either online or offline.

faq.question: Q8. What is the type of job offered by NIT Warangal?
faq.answer: The Junior Research Fellow positions are contractual in nature.

faq.question: Q9. Where is NIT Warangal located?
faq.answer: National Institute of Technology Warangal is located in Warangal, Telangana, with the pincode 506004.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates with a Bachelor's degree apply for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Yes, a Bachelor's degree with specific percentage requirements (7.5/10 or 70% for GEN etc., and 7.0/10 or 65% for SC/ST/PwD) is also considered as an eligibility criterion along with M.Tech/M.E.
